description: Master lab list for MedRPG. Comprehensive acute care lab database.

architecture_notes.panel_grouping: If player orders any component lab of a panel, the entire panel is returned. E.g. ordering sodium returns full BMP.
architecture_notes.repeat_ordering: Player warned if panel already ordered this encounter. Can re-order same AP cost to get updated results (runs whole panel again).
architecture_notes.ap_costs: Each panel = 1 AP except CMP = 2 AP (BMP + liver panel). Standalone labs = 1 AP each.
architecture_notes.bilirubin_panel_note: Ordering bilirubin panel triggers liver panel result automatically.
architecture_notes.display_type_note: qualitative: use reference_ranges[age_group].qualitative. numeric: use min/max with display_decimals.

pediatric_age_groups.note: CBC uses granular tiers. Bilirubin neonatal ranges deferred (follow AAP). Puberty/hormone ranges deferred.

architecture_notes.extensibility: Add labs to labs array, panels to panels array, new ui_categories as needed.

panels.name: Bilirubin Panel
panels.note: Ordering bilirubin panel triggers liver panel results automatically

adult.note: Neonates: varies by day of life—follow AAP neonatal hyperbilirubinemia guidelines
<0.1 normal; 0.1-0.25 low risk; >0.25 possible bacterial infection; >0.5 likely sepsis; >2.0 severe sepsis. Neonates: physiologically elevated first 48h
<100 heart failure unlikely; 100-400 borderline; >400 heart failure likely
Non-pregnant <5 mIU/mL; Pregnant: rises rapidly in first trimester
